title: Faculty Scholarship and Travel Grant – Faculty Affairs | Duke Kunshan University
text:
Faculty Scholarship and Travel Grant
Purpose
The Grant helps faculty members to develop new projects of research or to complete a current project, which in either case will lead to publications or other visible products (e.g., artistic installations, performances, or productions).
Eligibility
Regular rank faculty whose primary appointment is at Duke Kunshan University can apply for the grant to support a scholarship project or travel to a conference, meeting, or workshop. The grant is funded by the Office of the Vice Chancellor of Academic Affairs (VCAA).
Application Process
A call for proposals will be announced annually by the Office of Faculty Affairs in January, and applications are due in March for funding in the following fiscal year.
Please check below attachments for more application details.
FSTG Call for Proposal
